mapper.select: /* DB의 스네이크 케이스 필드명을 Entity의 카멜케이스 속성에 매핑 */ SELECT ct.id, ct.table_number AS tableNumber, ct.status, ct.access_token AS accessToken, ts.check_in_time AS checkInTime, ts.initial_guest_cnt AS guestCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table_message tm WHERE tm.table_id = ct.id AND tm.is_read = false) > 0 AS hasUnreadMessage FROM cafe_table ct LEFT JOIN table_session ts ON ct.current_session_id = ts.id ORDER BY ct.table_number
mapper.insert: /* 입장 인원, 패키지 정보를 기반으로 세션 생성. check_in_time은 DB DEFAULT 사용 */ INSERT INTO table_session ( table_id, package_id, initial_guest_cnt, is_active ) VALUES ( #{tableId}, #{packageId}, #{initialGuestCnt}, TRUE )
mapper.update: /* 모든 테이블을 공석으로 만들고 세션 연결을 강제 해제 */ /* 자정/강제 리셋: 상태(EMPTY), 세션포인터(NULL), 인증토큰(NULL)을 한 번에 초기화 */ UPDATE cafe_table SET status = 'EMPTY', current_session_id = NULL, access_token = NULL
UPDATE table_session SET is_active = FALSE, check_out_time = NOW() WHERE is_active = TRUE
mapper.select: SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id AS orderId, oi.menu_id AS menuId, oi.menu_name AS menuName, oi.price, oi.quantity FROM orders o JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.session_id = #{sessionId} AND o.status NOT IN ('PAID', 'CANCELLED') ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE table_message SET is_read = true WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND is_read = false
mapper.select: SELECT content FROM table_message WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND is_read = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
